title: Microwave radiometer data quality assurance at Magurele station, Romania
author: Toanca, Florica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Calibration of MWR profilers is a critical process essential for ensuring accurate and reliable atmospheric measurements. By precisely adjusting the instrument's parameters and responses, calibration enhances the quality and validity of the collected data. This meticulous procedure typically involves various steps, including the characterization of system noise, assessment of instrument stability, and validation against reference standards. 
 This document decribes the steps and results after calibration of MWR profiler MWR G5 at Magurele station in Romania.
steps_raw:
